title: Marry Me Chicken (In Sun-Dried Tomato Cream Sauce)
description: Marry Me Chicken is a quick, easy chicken dinner made with juicy chicken breasts smothered in a creamy parmesan sauce with sun-dried tomatoes and topped by fresh basil. Perfect for busy weeknights, family dinners, or date nights — one bite, you’ll quickly see why it’s called “Marry Me!”
